overall.description: A cinematic third-person game scene depicting a cloaked character standing in a dark, foggy field at night. The character faces a massive twisted tree structure in the distance, with scattered torch lights piercing through the mist. The atmosphere is somber and mysterious, characteristic of a fantasy open-world game.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy grassland with giant twisted tree landmark

agents.ego_description: cloaked character stands motionless in tall grass, facing the distant twisted tree and torch-lit settlement

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree trunk twisting upward, silhouetted against the cloudy night sky
leafless tree with twisted branches framing the left side of the view
dark evergreen tree framing the right side of the scene
warm orange flames flickering in the distance near the base of the giant tree
dark mountain range visible through the mist behind the twisted tree
tall wild grasses swaying slightly in the foreground where the character stands

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide, foggy grassland at night. A cloaked character stands motionless in the tall grass, facing a massive twisted tree structure silhouetted against a cloudy sky. Distant torch lights flicker near the tree's base, and dark mountains loom in the far background. Bare trees frame the scene on both sides, creating a somber, atmospheric mood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a wide, atmospheric vista of a foggy grassland at night that emphasizes the scale of a distant, mysterious landmark. It begins with a view of a cloaked character standing motionless in tall grass, framed by bare trees that enhance the somber mood. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward a massive twisted tree structure silhouetted against a heavy, cloudy sky. The scene then expands to reveal flickering torch lights at the tree's base, while dark mountains loom in the far background to complete the desolate landscape.
